notes: Per-site trendy_et_iav site classifications (all networks). Column 'trendy_et_iav_bin': existing 7-bin hybrid (unchanged). Column 'trendy_et_iav_bin_30': new 30-bin hybrid added. 30-bin scheme: bin 1 = < 5 mm yr-1; bins 2–30 = 29 equal-area quantile bins. 29 breakpoints (mm yr-1): 5.0, 9.9, 13.1, 14.9, 16.3, 17.8, 19.3, 20.6, 21.9, 23.2, 24.8, 26.1, 27.5, 29.3, 31.1, 33.0, 34.9, 36.9, 38.9, 41.2, 43.5, 46.3, 49.3, 52.9, 57.4, 62.9, 69.6, 78.5, 92.7.
